summary: High‑quality late Lee soundboard capture highlighted by an enthusiastic St. Stephen performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about this recording – one gives it a straight‑up five‑star “Fuck yes” and the other calls the source “tremendous,” noting its completeness for building a full‑show playlist. The tape is a late‑Lee soundboard dump, praised for being usable and complete, with St. Stephen singled out as a standout moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive remarks about the performance and the completeness of the Lee soundboard source outweigh the lack of detailed technical commentary; limited review count keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Late‑Lee source described as complete and usable; no specific audio flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No explicit comments on flow, but the enthusiasm suggests a well‑received performance overall.
